Welcome

Winters Electric LLC

Winters Electric LLC has been serving Boise and the surrounding region with premium electrician services built on a foundation of integrity, craftsmanship, and an unwavering commitment to excellence. Our team brings decades of combined experience to every project, ensuring results that stand the test of time.

Why Choose Us

Why Boise Trusts Winters Electric LLC

  • ✦ Quality Craftsmanship
  • ✦ Specialized Knowledge
  • ✦ Comprehensive Services
  • ✦ Proven Track Record
  • ✦ Family-Owned Commitment

Contact Us →
“
Winters Electric did a fantastic job upgrading our electrical panel. Our old panel was outdated and couldn't handle our modern appliances. The electrician was professional, knowledgeable, and explained everything clearly. The work was completed quickly and efficiently, and we haven't had any issues since. Highly recommended!
— Sarah M.
